title: v6.7 frontier: archmap-impact-audit machine verification
description: Add archmap-impact-audit as a safe_read verify command: for every implementation-grade work item at or after the TASK-071 cutoff, verify (a) an archmap impact record exists and resolves, (b) status is one of archmap_update_required / archmap_unaffected / archmap_deferred_with_reason, (c) council_review_status is not pending. Acceptance: negative fixture with a missing disposition fails the audit; unit tests pass; command is registered with help metadata. Stop condition: audit command + fixtures + tests only; no renderer integration, no retroactive schema migration. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of governed disposition, not proof of semantic architecture correctness.
triage_notes: Implemented archmap-impact-audit safe_read verifier with command registry/help metadata, CLI reference, schema, self-hosting impact record, and pass/fail regression tests. Verification: archmap-impact-audit pass, command-routing-audit pass, organization-verify pass, release-state-audit pass, npm test pass, npm run smoke pass.
